== Accolades ==
At the Mainichi Film Awards, Jin-Roh: The Wolf Brigade won the Animation Film Award and The Old Man and the Sea won the ŇĆfuji NoburŇć Award. Internationally, The Old Man and the Sea also won the Academy Award for Best Animated Short Film.
